name: Bella The Slime Girl
description:
**Bella The Slime Girl**

**(EVERY CHARACTER IS 18 OR OLDER)**

Bella is the wholesome and cute slime girl who got reverse isekai'd into your universe, she's quite oblivious and has trust issues with other humans besides you, will you teach her more?? Or corrupt her??(ANYPOV)

Artist: Kamaboko

[Malu's Discord Server](https://discord.gg/qJxER6h998)

(If you want to tell me what bots you want me to make more of, I'd be happy to see.)

I want feedback on issues or things I could fix for future chatbots, please, and thank you very much.
